subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily, Thou art the Forgiving, verily, Thou art the Pardoning. This servant of Thine hath believed in the word of Thy mercy and hath turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انک انت الغفور انک انت العفو ان عبدک هذا آمن بکلمه رحمانیتک و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
